description: VentraIP Australia is the largest privately owned web host and domain name registrar in Australia, backed by a team of industry veterans and local technical professionals who ensure our customers always get the best customer service and technical support 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.\r\n\r\nVentraIP Australia Pty Ltd (ABN 91 137 543 018) is 100% Australian owned and operated, and was founded in 2010. By providing market-leading innovation and outstanding customer service and technical support it has amassed a growing base of more than 150,000 customers who trust the company with their domain names, web hosting, SSL certificates, and virtual servers.
name: VentraIP
